locations.name: 巴哈马
locations.summary: 巴哈馬國（英語：Commonwealth of The Bahamas），通称巴哈马（英語：The Bahamas，/bəˈhɑːməz/），是位於大西洋西侧廬卡雅群島上的一个島國，全國包含700座岛屿（以及小岛屿）和珊瑚礁。地處美国佛罗…

locations.name: 古巴
locations.summary: 古巴共和国（西班牙語：República de Cuba），通称古巴（Cuba），是美洲西印度群島西部的社会主义国家，介於北緯19°與24°、西經74°與85°之間。該國地處墨西哥灣口，西隔尤卡坦海峡與墨西哥尤卡坦半岛相望，南鄰牙買加和開…

relations.subject: Great lizard cuckoo
relations.evidence: bahamensis is similarly non-selective, inhabiting semi-deciduous, deciduous, and pine forest (especially forests with many vines), scrublands, and coffee plantations. thumb|right|Back view
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Great lizard cuckoo
relations.evidence: Identified potential threats include road construction, agricultural development, fires, feral cats and rats, and sea level rise due to climate change
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
